creator: yarodin@gmail.com
text:
Sorry, but it's more accuracy patch:

diff -ruN basket.orig/Makefile basket/Makefile
--- basket.orig/Makefile        2007-05-20 02:01:23.000000000 +0600
+++ basket/Makefile     2008-02-24 11:58:35.000000000 +0500
@@ -5,8 +5,8 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/deskutils/basket/Makefile,v 1.25 2007/05/19 20:01:23 flz 
Exp $

 PORTNAME=              basket
-PORTVERSION=           1.0.1
-PORTREVISION=          1
+PORTVERSION=           1.0.2
+PORTREVISION=          0
 CATEGORIES=            deskutils kde
 MASTER_SITES=          http://basket.kde.org/downloads/

diff -ruN basket.orig/distinfo basket/distinfo
--- basket.orig/distinfo        2007-03-20 01:00:04.000000000 +0500
+++ basket/distinfo     2008-02-24 10:56:33.000000000 +0500
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (basket-1.0.1.tar.gz) = 387ee0249185a2a6d6e9a3a3a358d9d2
-SHA256 (basket-1.0.1.tar.gz) = 
dbc2342c3a7a1e771f3a85a38016a0a41ccf57a0f3f22e836e8f5c19e11b73eb
-SIZE (basket-1.0.1.tar.gz) = 6041339
+MD5 (basket-1.0.2.tar.gz) = d71c62a56de9cc32ba2633e63e99071f
+SHA256 (basket-1.0.2.tar.gz) = 
8c5715f700724b274d162074b601947136d8b71caa36bc3fa36a7b95836b997e
+SIZE (basket-1.0.2.tar.gz) = 6046068
